name: Dark Sense
description: Whenever a Generator is completed, Dark Sense activates: "Take it from an old-timer: Slow down, don't rush and try not to worry so much! The best way to beat him is to know how he thinks." — Murf, The Lost Tapes • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 10seconds once they come within 24 metres of your location.

name: Déjà Vu
description: • The Auras of the 3 Generators in closest proximity to one another are revealed to you at all times. • Increases your Repair speed on those Generators by 6% .

name: Hope
description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, Hope activates: Once the Exit Gates are powered, Hope activates: • Grants a permanent 7% Haste Status Effect .

name: Kindred
description: Whenever any Survivor is hooked, Kindred activates and applies the following effects: Whenever any Survivor is hooked, Kindred activates and applies the following effects: • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to all Survivors whenever the Killer comes within 16metres of the Hook . • If you are the Hooked Survivor , the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to each other. • If you are not the Hooked Survivor , the Auras of all other Survivors are only revealed to you.

name: Lightweight
description: • Reduces the Lifetime of your Scratch Marks by 5seconds . • Reduces the Spawn chance of patches of Scratch Marks by -60 % , making their spacing inconsistent.

name: No One Left Behind
description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, No One Left Behind activates: Once the Exit Gates are powered, No One Left Behind activates: • Increases your Action speeds for Healing and Unhooking by 50% . • Increases the Haste Status Effect of Survivors unhooked by you by +7 % . • The Auras of the other Survivors are revealed to you.

name: Plunderer's Instinct
description: • The Auras of the following objects are revealed to you within 64metres : Closed Chests located in the environment. Items sitting inside opened Chests . Items dropped in the environment. • Closed Chests located in the environment. • Items sitting inside opened Chests . • Items dropped in the environment. • Increases the Odds of finding Items of higher Rarities in Chests by +50 % .

name: Premonition
description: Premonition has a cool-down of 30seconds each time it activates. Get an auditory warning when looking in the direction of the Killer in a 45° cone within a range of 36metres . • Receive an auditory warning upon looking in the Killer's direction within a 45 ° cone within 36 metres .

name: Resilience
description: Resilience does not apply to the following interactions: • Increases your Action speeds for Repairing, Healing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, Vaulting, Cleansing, Blessing, Opening, and Unlocking by 9% when in the Injured State . • Rescuing another Survivor from a Hook or a Bear Trap . • Healing oneself or another Survivor. • Vaulting speed of Windows and Pallets .

name: Slippery Meat
description: Increases by 15% the speed at which you attempt to free yourself from Bear Traps and Hooks. The odds of freeing yourself from Bear Traps is increased by 10% . • Increases the number of available Self-Unhook attempts by +3 . • Increases the Odds of succeeding a Self-Unhook attempt by 4% .

name: Small Game
description: Small Game has a cool-down of 10seconds each time it activates. For each Dull or Hex Totem cleansed by any Player, Small Game is automatically granted 1 Token : • Receive an auditory warning upon looking in the direction of Totems in a 45 ° cone within 12metres . • Each Token reduces the Detection cone's angle by 5 ° , down to a minimum of 20 ° .

name: Spine Chill
description: Whenever the Killer is within 36 metres of your location and looking at you with a clear Line of Sight , Spine Chill activates: Whenever the Killer is within 36 metres of your location and looking at you with a clear Line of Sight , Spine Chill activates: • Warns of the Killer's proximity and their potential awareness of your location by lighting its icon. • Increases your Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, Gate-Opening, Healing, Repairing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, and Unlocking by 6% . This effect lingers for 0.5 seconds after the Killer loses Line of Sight or exits the Activation range. • This effect lingers for 0.5 seconds after the Killer loses Line of Sight or exits the Activation range.

name: This Is Not Happening
description: • Increases the Success zone of Great Skill Checks while Repairing and Healing by 30% when in the Injured State .

name: We'll Make It
description: After unhooking another Survivor, We'll Make It activates: After unhooking another Survivor, We'll Make It activates: • Increases your Altruistic Healing speed by +100 % for 90seconds .

name: Ace in the Hole
description: When retrieving an Item from a Chest , there is a chance an Add-on will be attached to it: "Everything that glitters isn't gold. But gold isn't worth a damn in this place, so this should come in handy." — Ace Visconti • 100 % chance for an Add-on of Very Rare Rarity or lower. • 50% chance for a second Add-on of Uncommon Rarity or lower.

name: Open-Handed
description: Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Open-Handed at a time. "Paying attention is what kept me alive through the years. That, and my good looks of course." — Ace Visconti • Increases the radius of all Aura-reading abilities emanating from yourself or other Survivors by 16metres .

name: Up the Ante
description: For every Survivor still in the Trial, Up the Ante is granted +1 Token : • Increases the Odds of every Survivor succeeding a Self-Unhook attempt by a stack-able 3% per Token, up to a maximum of 9% . • Up the Ante does not affect the Rarity of Items found in Chests [ 1 ] . • ↑ https://forum.deadbydaylight.com/en/discussion/comment/1302984/#Comment_1302984 Comment by Community Moderator Peanits

name: Wiretap
description: After repairing Generators for a total of 40 % , Wiretap activates: The Auras of Trapped Generators are revealed to all Survivors in yellow . • Press the Active Ability button while near a partially progressed Generator to install a Trap , which stays active for 120seconds . • Whenever the Killer comes within 14 metres of the Trapped Generator their Aura is revealed to all Survivors.

name: Autodidact
description: Autodidact is inactive when healing using a Med-Kit . "There's no limit to what you can achieve, as long as you back with hard work." — Adam Francis • Suppresses Great Healing Skill Checks . • Causes Good Healing Skill Checks to grant Healing progress based on the number of accumulated Tokens: 0 Tokens : -15 % . 1 Token : +0 % . 2 Tokens : +15 % . 3 Tokens : +30 % (limit of Tier I ). 4 Tokens : +45 % (limit of Tier II ). 5 Tokens : +60 % (limit of Tier III ). • 3 Tokens : +30 % (limit of Tier I ).

name: Deliverance
description: Deliverance cannot be used during the second Hook Stage or if you are hooked as the Last Survivor Standing . Deliverance is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use. "I was raised by a strict man who taught me how to make the best of a bad situation." — Adam Francis • Grants the ability to perform a successful Self-Unhook at any point during the first Hook Stage . • Causes the Broken Status Effect for 60seconds after unhooking yourself. • Deliverance remains unaffected by outside modifiers to the Unhook chances, always guaranteeing a successful Self-Unhook .

name: Diversion
description: • Press the Active Ability button while crouched and motionless to throw a pebble in the direction you are facing, creating a distraction for the Killer 20 metres away from your location: Triggers a Loud Noise Notification . Creates fake Scratch Marks . • Triggers a Loud Noise Notification .

name: Bardic Inspiration
description: Press the Active Ability button while standing and motionless to enter the Performance interaction that lasts up to 15 seconds and empowers other Survivors within 16 metres of your location. The empowering effect depends on the result of you rolling a d20 and lasts for 90 seconds after completing the Performance : • 1 : You scream, but without notifying the Killer. • 2 - 10 : Skill Checks grant +1 % Progression. • 11 - 19 : Skill Checks grant +2 % Progression.

name: Mirrored Illusion
description: After repairing Generators for a total of 20 % , Mirrored Illusion activates: "Just... stay there... perfect!" — Baermar • Press the Active Ability button when next to either a Chest , Exit Gate , Generator , or a Totem to spawn a Static Illusion that lasts for 60seconds .

name: Still Sight
description: After standing still for 4seconds , Still Sight activates: • The Auras of the Killer as well as any Chests and Generators within 24 metres of your location are revealed to you until you start moving again. • While technically "standing still", Still Sight does not activate if the Player is actively interacting with a Prop or other Survivors. It does activate when the Player is being healed by another Survivor, since in that case they are indeed "standing still" and also not the one performing the interaction, but rather the one who is being interacted with, which does not conflict with Still Sight's activation condition. • It does activate when the Player is being healed by another Survivor, since in that case they are indeed "standing still" and also not the one performing the interaction, but rather the one who is being interacted with, which does not conflict with Still Sight's activation condition.

name: Boon: Illumination
description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem . Soft chimes ring out in a radius of 24 metres . All Survivors benefit from the following effects when inside the Boon Totem's radius: • The Auras of all Chests and Generators are revealed to you in blue .

name: Champion of Light
description: Shining a Flashlight applies the following effect: "I squeezed the Flashlight like my life depended on it, willing it to stop coming any closer." — Departure • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect . • Causes them to suffer from a -20 % Hindered Status Effect for 6 seconds . This effect does not stack.

name: Deadline
description: Whenever you are in the Injured State , Deadline activates: "The night had been one desperate situation after another." — Departure • Increases the Odds of triggering Skill Checks by 10% while repairing or healing. Causes Skill Checks to appear in random places. • Causes Skill Checks to appear in random places. • Reduces the penalty for missed Skill Checks by -50 % .

name: Buckle Up
description: When healing a Survivor in the Dying State , Buckle Up activates: "Ghost beaters never leave a man behind." — Ash Williams • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to the both of you. • Completing a Healing Action on the dying Survivor suppresses their Scratch Marks and grants them a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 5seconds .

name: Flip-Flop
description: • Recovering in the Dying State also charges the Wiggle Meter at 50 % of the Recovery rate and up to a maximum of 50% of Wiggle Progression. • Features good synergy with both Unbreakable and/or Tenacity allowing you to get more recovery and/or distance before being grabbed by the Killer. • Assuming that the Killer does not pick you up instantly, Flip-Flop will allow you to instantly activate Power Struggle while underneath a Pallet .

name: Mettle of Man
description: After triggering your third Protection Hit , Mettle of Man activates: Mettle of Man deactivates the next time you are put into the Dying State . • While injured, Mettle of Man shields you from going down the next time you take damage. • Healing back to full health will reveal your Aura to the Killer whenever you are farther than 16metres from them.

name: Borrowed Time
description: The Survivors you unhook benefit from the following effects: The Survivors you unhook benefit from the following effects: • Extends the duration of their Endurance Status Effect by 10seconds . • Extends the duration of their Haste Status Effect by 10 seconds .

name: Left Behind
description: Once you are the Last Survivor Standing , Left Behind activates: Once you are the Last Survivor Standing , Left Behind activates: • The Aura of the Hatch is revealed to you within 32metres .

name: Unbreakable
description: Once per Trial, you can completely recover from the Dying State . "Goddammit, I am seriously FUBAR!" — Bill Overbeck • Your Recovery speed is increased by 35% .

name: Blood Pact
description: When either you or the Obsession become injured by any means, Blood Pact activates: Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by reducing the default value by -100 % . The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time. • Your Auras are constantly revealed to one another. • Completing a Healing Action on the Obsession or having them complete one on yourself, grants both of you a 7% Haste Status Effect . This effect lasts for as long as you both remain within 16 metres of one another. • This effect lasts for as long as you both remain within 16 metres of one another.

name: Repressed Alliance
description: After repairing Generators for a total of 45seconds , Repressed Alliance activates: Repressed Alliance can only be triggered when no other Survivors are repairing your Generator. • Press the Active Ability button to call upon The Entity to block the Generator you are currently repairing for 30 seconds , after which Repressed Alliance deactivates. • The Aura of the blocked Generator is revealed to all Survivors in white .

name: Soul Guard
description: After being healed from or having recovered from the Dying State , you benefit from the following effect: After being healed from or having recovered from the Dying State, Soul Guard grants you the Endurance Status Effect for the next 8seconds . • Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 8seconds . Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action . • Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action . • Grants the ability to fully recover yourself from the Dying State.

name: Botany Knowledge
description: Botany Knowledge functions by increasing the default Healing speed ( 1 c/s ) by +0.3 c/s / +0.4 c/s / +0.5 c/s : • Increases your Healing speed by 50% . • Reduces the Healing efficiency of Med-Kits by -20 % .

name: Empathy
description: • The Auras of injured or dying Survivors are revealed to you within 128metres .

name: Self-Care
description: Skill Checks triggered in this situation have their success zones reduced by 0% . Increases the efficiency of Med-Kit self-heal by 100% . • Unlocks the Self-Care ability, allowing you to self-heal without needing a Med-Kit at 35% of the normal Healing speed.

name: Dead Hard
description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Dead Hard activates whenever you are injured and running, and allows you to tap into your adrenaline bank to avoid taking further damage: Dead Hard causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 40seconds . Dead Hard cannot be used when Exhausted . • Press the Active Ability button to trigger the Endurance Status Effect for 0.5 seconds .

name: No Mither
description: The following effects apply permanently during the Trial: The following effects apply permanently during the Trial: • Suffer from the Broken Status Effect . • Suppresses the creation of Pools of Blood . • Reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain while either in the Injured or the Dying State by 75% .

name: We're Gonna Live Forever
description: You benefit from the following effect when healing a dying Survivor: You benefit from the following effect when healing a dying Survivor: • Increases your Healing speed by +100 % . • Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 10seconds . This effect can only be triggered once every 30 seconds . • This effect can only be triggered once every 30 seconds .

name: Detective's Hunch
description: Each time a Generator is completed, the Auras of any Generators , Chests , and Totems within 64metres are revealed to you for 10 seconds . "Are you able to tell us where you were last night?" — Detective David Tapp • If you are holding a Map , any objects revealed by Detective's Hunch will automatically be tracked by it.

name: Stake Out
description: Every 15 seconds you are within the Killer's Terror Radius , while not being chased, Stake Out gains 1 Token , up to a maximum of 4Tokens . "I had you, I had you on your knees. You're runnin' scared because we had you. We're gonna close this case!" — Detective David Tapp • When Stake Out has at least 1 Token , Good Skill Checks consume 1 Token and are considered Great Skill Checks, granting an additional Progression bonus of +1 % . • Great Skill Checks do not consume any Tokens.

name: Tenacity
description: Your ferocious tenacity in dire situations allow you to benefit from the following effects: "What the hell is this? I'm taking this bastard down!" — Detective David Tapp • Increases your Crawling speed by 50% . • Grants the ability to crawl and recover at the same time. • Reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain while in the Dying State by -75 % .

name: Bond
description: • The Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you within 36metres .

name: Leader
description: Other Survivors within 8 metres of your location benefit from the following effect: Other Survivors within 8 metres of your location benefit from the following effect: • Increases the Action speeds for Cleansing, Gate-Opening, Healing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, and Unlocking by 25% . This effect lingers for 15 seconds after leaving the Area of Effect . • This effect lingers for 15 seconds after leaving the Area of Effect .

name: Prove Thyself
description: Prove Thyself extends its effect to all Survivors within its range. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Prove Thyself at a time.

name: Chemical Trap
description: After repairing Generators for a total of 20 % , Chemical Trap activates: The Auras of Trapped Pallets are revealed to all Survivors in yellow . • Press the Active Ability button while near a dropped Pallet to install a Trap, which stays active for 60seconds . • When the Killer breaks the Trapped Pallet , its Trap explodes, spraying the Killer with a chemical compound: Causes the Killer to suffer from a -50 % Hindered Status Effect for 4 seconds . • Causes the Killer to suffer from a -50 % Hindered Status Effect for 4 seconds .

name: Light-Footed
description: Whenever you are healthy, Light-Footed activates: • Suppresses the sound of your footsteps while running.

name: Lucky Star
description: While hiding inside a Locker , you benefit from the following effect: "You are my... lucky star..." — Ellen Ripley • Suppresses your Grunts of Pain . • Suppresses your Grunts of Pain and the creation of Pools of Blood . • The Auras of the other Survivors are revealed to you.

name: Built to Last
description: Hiding inside a Locker for 12seconds while carrying a depleted Item has the following effect: "Architecture is the soul of civilisation." — Felix Richter • First use : Recharges the Item to 99 % . • Second use : Recharges the Item to 66 % . • Third use : Recharges the Item to 33 % .

name: Desperate Measures
description: "When they come with a wrecking ball, build stronger walls." — Felix Richter • Increases your Action speeds for Healing and Unhooking by 14% for each injured, hooked, or dying Survivor, up to a maximum of 56% .

name: Visionary
description: • The Auras of Generators are revealed to you within 32 metres . • Each time a Generator is completed, Visionary is deactivated for 16seconds . • You can extend Visionary's range by using the Perk Open-Handed . • Visionary still shows an Aura for Generators blocked by The Entity . • Déjà Vu does not boost repair speed to generators revealed by Visionary .

name: Alert
description: Whenever the Killer performs the Break or Damage Action, Alert triggers: Whenever the Killer performs the Break or Damage action, Alert triggers: • Their Aura is revealed to you for 5seconds .

name: Lithe
description: Lithe causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 40seconds . Lithe cannot be used when Exhausted . • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds .

name: Technician
description: When repairing a Generator , the following effects apply: The Hearing distance of noises caused by your Repairs is reduced by 8metres . • Reduces the audible range of your Repair noises by -8 metres . • Suppresses the explosion and accompanying Loud Noise Notification when failing a Skill Check . • Failing a Skill Check instantly regresses the Generator by 3% of its maximum possible Progression in addition to the default Progression penalty.

name: Made for This
description: Whenever you are in the Injured State , Made for This activates and you benefit from the following effects: Whenever you are in the Injured State, Made for This activates and you benefit from the following effects: • Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 10seconds , after completing a Healing action on another Survivor. Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action . • Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action . • Grants a 3% Haste Status Effect while running and also suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect .

name: Scavenger
description: While holding a depleted Toolbox , Scavenger activates: Scavenger grants the ability to rummage through an opened Chest once per Trial and will guarantee a basic Toolbox . • Succeeding at Great Repairing Skill Checks grants 1 Token , up to a maximum of 5 Tokens . • Reaching the maximum number of Tokens automatically consumes them and fully recharges the Toolbox . • Recharging a Toolbox will reduce your Repair speed by -50 % for the next 30seconds .

name: Troubleshooter
description: When you are chased by the Killer, Troubleshooter activates: These effects linger for 10seconds after ending the Chase, after which Troubleshooter deactivates. • The Aura of the Generator with the most progress is revealed to you. • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 6seconds after dropping a Pallet .

name: Inner Focus
description: • Grants the ability to see the Scratch Marks of other Survivors. • Whenever another Survivor loses a Health State due to the Killer, the Aura of the latter is revealed to your for 10seconds .

name: Overzealous
description: After cleansing or blessing a Totem , Overzealous activates: "The Ravage senses us. We need to work fast." — Haddie Kaur, Ravages of the Abyss Episode 9 • Dull Totem : Increases your Repair speed by 10% . • Hex Totem : Increases your Repair speed by 20% .

name: Residual Manifest
description: • After a successful Killer Blind , the Killer suffers from the Blindness Status Effect for 30seconds . • Residual Manifest grants the ability to rummage through an opened Chest once per Trial and will guarantee a basic Flashlight . • Residual Manifest also applies the Blindness Status Effect to blinds caused by Firecrackers , Flash Grenades or Blast Mine . • When used with Appraisal , Residual Manifest's Token is consumed first.

name: Calm Spirit
description: • Prevents Crows from being alerted by your proximity and flying off, unless they are being stepped on. • Suppresses the urge to scream from any cause at all times. • Suppresses all noises related to unlocking Chests , and cleansing or blessing Totems . • Reduces the Interaction speeds with Chests and Totems by 30% .

name: Iron Will
description: • Reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain while in the Injured State by 100% .

name: Saboteur
description: Unlocks the ability to sabotage Hooks without Toolboxes : Unlocks the ability to sabotage Hooks without Toolboxes : • While the Killer is carrying another Survivor, the Auras of all Hooks within 56 metres of their original Pick-up location are revealed to you: The Auras of normal Hooks are white . The Auras of Scourge Hooks are yellow . • The Auras of normal Hooks are white . • The Auras of Scourge Hooks are yellow .

name: Head On
description: After hiding in a Locker for 3 seconds , Head On activates: "People are remembered for the challenges they overcome. You can run away and forget what you're capable of or you can face your fears and remind the world of who you are." — Jane Romero • Performing a Rush Exit out of the Locker stuns a nearby Killer for 3 seconds .

name: Poised
description: Whenever a Generator is completed, you benefit from the following effect for 14seconds : "Ok, stay calm. Don't overthink it and just keep moving forward: you got this." — Jane Romero • Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks .

name: Solidarity
description: While injured and healing another Survivor without using a Med-Kit , you benefit from the following effect: "Showing up when things get rough, listening to people's problems, and supporting those in need; that's how you become stronger, that's how you grow." — Jane Romero • Passively heal yourself at a rate of 70% of your Altruistic Healing speed.

name: Aftercare
description: The Auras of the last 3Survivor(s) are permanently revealed to you, once any of the following conditions have been met: Aftercare resets its effect once you are hooked. • You have completed a Healing action on them. • They have completed a Healing action on you.

name: Breakdown
description: Hooks broken by Breakdown take 180 seconds to respawn. "Charge from the Belly of the Beast. Here's a sketch/painting on a piece of wood I saw by the side of this road. I felt like it got a story to tell. And it didn't waste its second chance." — Jeff, ink and oil wash on slice of wood, 12x16 • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 6seconds . • Causes the Hook to break instantly.

name: Distortion
description: Whenever the Killer attempts to read your Aura , Distortion activates and consumes -1 Token , applying the following effects for 12seconds : Distortion does not activate when you are in the Dying State. • Blocks your Aura from being read. • Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks .

name: Blast Mine
description: After repairing Generators for a total of 40 % , Blast Mine activates: The Auras of Trapped Generators are revealed to all Survivors in yellow . • Press the Active Ability button while near a partially progressed Generator to install a Trap, which stays active for 120seconds . • When the Killer damages the Trapped Generator , its Trap explodes half-way through: Stuns the Killer for 4 seconds . Blinds all Players within 12.5 metres of the Trapped Generator . • Stuns the Killer for 4 seconds .

name: Counterforce
description: • Gain another, stack-able 20 % Cleansing Speed bonus per cleansed Totem. • After cleansing a Totem, the Aura of the Totem farthest from you is revealed to you for 4seconds .

name: Resurgence
description: Being unhooked or unhooking yourself grants you 50% Healing progress. Being unhooked or unhooking yourself grants you 70% Healing progress. • Being unhooked or unhooking yourself grants you 70% Healing progress.

name: Boon: Exponential
description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem . Soft chimes ring out in a radius of 24 metres . All Survivors benefit from the following effects when inside the Boon Totem's radius: • 100% bonus to the Recovery speed. • Unlocks the Self-Recovery ability, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State . • Time to recover from the Dying State: ~16 seconds (at Tier 3 ).

name: Corrective Action
description: You start the Trial with 3Token(s) . Whenever you succeed a Great Skill Check , Corrective Action gains +1 Token , up to a maximum of 5 Tokens : "Cannot hurt to have another set of eyes on the problem." — Jonah Vasquez • Converts any Failed Skill Check of another Survivor into a Good Skill Check instead and consumes -1 Token . • The Aura of that Survivor is revealed to you for 6 seconds .

name: Overcome
description: Becoming injured by any means triggers Overcome : "After careful analysis, we are getting the hell out of here!" — Jonah Vasquez • Extends the duration of the On-hit Speed Boost by +2 seconds . • The default On-hit Sprint lasts for 1.8 seconds . • Overcome will not trigger if The Huntress has equipped the Add-on Venomous Concoction , which immediately applies Exhaustion .

name: Boil Over
description: While being carried by the Killer, the following effects apply: While being carried by the Killer, the following effects apply: • Increases the strength of the Struggle Effects on the Killer from your Wiggling by 80% . • Suppresses the ability of the Killer to read the Auras of all Hooks within 16 metres . • Grants +33 % of your current Wiggle progression upon landing, if the Killer drops from height.

name: Dance With Me
description: Dance With Me has a cool-down of 20seconds . "Another show's off and runnin', Dance with me, cuz there's a storm a commin' Follow my boots, try to keep up, Dance with me, until sun up." — Kate Denson's "Dance with Me" • Suppresses the creation of Scratch Marks for 3 seconds .

name: Windows of Opportunity
description: The Auras of Breakable Walls , Pallets , and Windows are revealed to you within 32metres . "Rise and shine, work hard, carve out your name, Take aim, pull the trigger, hit the bulls eye for fame, Know the value of faith, an' family, and don't you complain, Open wide, your windows of opportunity" — Kate Denson's "Windows of Opportunity"

name: Finesse
description: Whenever you are healthy, Finesse activates: "Just need to push myself a bit further." — Lara Croft • Increases your Vaulting speed for a Fast Vault by +20 % . • Finesse has a unique Vaulting animation when it activates. • Finesse does not activate on a Medium Vault .

name: Hardened
description: After unlocking a Chest and either blessing or cleansing a Totem , Hardened activates: • Suppresses the urge to scream from any cause and instead causes the Aura of the Killer to be revealed to you for 5seconds .

name: Specialist
description: Whenever you unlock or rummage through a Chest , Specialist gains +1 Token , up to a maximum of 6 Tokens : • Succeeding a Great Repair Skill Check while repairing a Generator consumes all Tokens. • Permanently reduces the Repair Charges requirement of that Generator by 4Charges per Token, up to a maximum of 24Charges . • Players can save Specialist for use at their discretion by purposefully only hitting Good Repair Skill Checks on Generators that they do not wish to activate it on. • While the effect of Specialist is quite strong, its strength is balanced out by the fact that in order to reduce a Generator's Repair requirement by a substantial amount, the user first needed to spend a lot of time interacting with Chests , which is time that they could have spent repairing a Generator instead. Specialist is therefore most useful as a late-game three-gen breaker.

name: Decisive Strike
description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Decisive Strike activates for the next 60seconds : Decisive Strike is deactivated prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action and remains disabled for the remainder of the Trial. • When grabbed or picked up by the Killer, succeed a Skill Check to stab the Killer and escape from their grasp. Stuns the Killer for 4 seconds . • Stuns the Killer for 4 seconds . • Causes you to become the next Obsession .

name: Object of Obsession
description: Whenever the Killer reads your Aura , Object of Obsession activates for the same duration as their Aura-reading action: Whenever the Killer reads your Aura, Object of Obsession activates for the same duration as their Aura-reading action: • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you. • Increases your Action speeds for Cleansing, Healing, and Repairing actions by 6% . • Your Aura is revealed to the Killer for 3 seconds .

name: Sole Survivor
description: Each time a Survivor other than yourself is killed or sacrificed, Sole Survivor gains 1 Token , up to a maximum of 3 Tokens : The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time. • Grants a stack-able radius of 24metres per Token around you, up to a maximum of 72metres , within which you are immune to the Killer's Aura-reading abilities. • Increases your Repair speed by +75 % . • Increases your Gate and Hatch Opening speeds by +50 % .

name: Bite the Bullet
description: When healing yourself or another Survivor, you benefit from the following effects: When combined with Deadline , Deadline will apply its Penalty-Reduction effect to the new baseline value defined by Bite the Bullet's current Tier. • Suppresses all noises related to Healing and Grunts of Pain . • Failed Healing Skill Checks do not trigger a Loud Noise Notification . Reduces the Penalty to 1% of the total Progression. • Reduces the Penalty to 1% of the total Progression.

name: Flashbang
description: After repairing Generators for a total of 40% , Flashbang activates: "Get outta my face!" — Leon Scott Kennedy • Press the Active Ability button while hiding inside a Locker to craft a Flash Grenade .

name: Rookie Spirit
description: While repairing Generators , succeed 3Good or Great Skill Checks to activate Rookie Spirit for the remainder of the Trial: • The Auras of any regressing Generators are revealed to you until they stop regressing by any means. • Rookie Spirit can be activated by any kind of successful Skill Check that can be triggered during Generator Repairs. • Rookie Spirit does not reveal the auras of blocked Generators that were regressing prior to a corresponding effect of a perk or an add-on triggering. They only become revealed again after the Generator becomes unblocked.

name: Adrenaline
description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, Adrenaline activates: Once the Exit Gates are powered, Adrenaline activates: • Instantly heal the equivalent of 1 Health State . • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds .

name: Quick & Quiet
description: Quick & Quiet has a cool-down of 20seconds . This effect can only be triggered every 20seconds . • Suppresses both the Loud Noise Notification and the sound effects triggered by rushing to vault Windows , Pallets , or rushing to enter or exit Lockers .

name: Sprint Burst
description: Sprint Burst causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 40seconds . Sprint Burst cannot be used when Exhausted . "See you if you can catch up..." — Meg Thomas • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds .

name: Boon: Circle of Healing
description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem . Soft chimes ring out in a radius of 24 metres . All Survivors benefit from the following effects when inside the Boon Totem's radius: • Increases the Altruistic Healing speeds by 100% when not using a Med-Kit . • If a Survivor is injured, their Aura is revealed to all other Survivors.

name: Boon: Shadow Step
description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem . Soft chimes ring out in a radius of 24 metres . All Survivors benefit from the following effects when inside the Boon Totem's radius: • Auras are hidden from The Killer. Both effects linger for 4seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range. • Both effects linger for 4seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range. • If a Pebble ( Diversion ) is thrown inside the Boon: Shadow Step' s radius, the Pebble's Scratch Marks will be hidden.

name: Clairvoyance
description: After cleansing or blessing a Totem , Clairvoyance activates: After cleansing or blessing a Totem , Clairvoyance activates: • While empty-handed, press and hold the Use Item button to unlock your full Aura-reading potential for up to 10seconds , allowing you to see the Auras of the following environmental objects within 64 metres : Chests Exit Gate Switches Generators Hatch Hooks

name: Better Together
description: • While repairing a Generator , its Aura is highlighted in yellow to all other Survivors within 32 metres . • Whenever the Killer downs a Survivor while you are repairing a Generator , the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you for 10seconds .

name: Fixated
description: • Increases your Walking speed by 20% . • Unlocks the ability to see your own Scratch Marks .

name: Inner Strength
description: Each time you cleanse a Totem , Inner Strength activates: "All this time I've been trying so hard to pretend like everything's fine, but it's not." — Nancy Wheeler • You are automatically healed 1 Health State while hiding inside a Locker for 8seconds when injured or suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect .

name: Balanced Landing
description: After falling from a height, you benefit from the following effects: "I have jumped from higher places." — Nea Karlsson • Reduces the duration of the Stagger upon landing by -75 % . • Suppresses all noises associated with falling. • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds upon landing.

name: Streetwise
description: Streetwise extends its effect to all other Survivors within 8 metres of your location and lingers for 15 seconds . "You are doing it wrong! Let me show you how it is done." — Nea Karlsson • Increases the Efficiency of your Items by 25% .

name: Urban Evasion
description: "The paint is still fresh but I am long gone." — Nea Karlsson When crouching and uninjured, your Movement speed is increased by 15% . • Increases your Crouching Movement speed by 100% .

name: Dramaturgy
description: Whenever you are Healthy , Dramaturgy activates: "Take the part. It's a good movie, he says. What's the worst that can happen?" — Nicolas Cage • While running, press the Active Ability button to run with knees high for 0.5 seconds to gain a +25 % Haste Status Effect for 2 seconds , followed by one of the following effects: Suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 12 seconds . Extend the duration of the Haste Status Effect for another 2 seconds . Scream, but without notifying the Killer. Receive a random Item of Rare Rarity, with a random selection of Add-ons attached to it, automatically dropping any previously held Item. • Suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 12 seconds . • Extend the duration of the Haste Status Effect for another 2 seconds .

name: Plot Twist
description: Whenever you are in the Injured State , Plot Twist activates: "I think you'll find this shooting location... captivating." — Pauline Stamper • While crouching and motionless, press the Active Ability button to silently enter the Dying State with the following benefits: Suppresses Grunts of Pain . Suppresses Pools of Blood . Grants the ability to fully recover from the Dying State. • Grants the ability to fully recover from the Dying State. • After full recovery using Plot Twist , you are healed instantly and gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 4seconds .

name: Scene Partner
description: Whenever you are inside the Terror Radius , Scene Partner activates: "This is not in the script!" — Nicolas Cage • Looking at the Killer causes you to scream, which reveals their Aura for 5seconds . • There is a chance of 50 % that you will scream again, extending the Aura-reveal duration by another 2 seconds . • Scene Partner should not be used together with Calm Spirit or Hardened . Calm Spirit and Hardened suppress the urge to scream, preventing Scene Partner from triggering.

name: Pharmacy
description: Whenever you are in the Injured State , Pharmacy activates: "Adrenaline, it is going to keep us awake. I stole it from one of the Nurse's carts." — Quentin Smith • Increases the Unlocking speed of Chests by 80% . • Reduces the Hearing range of noises related to Unlocking by -8 metres . • Guarantees an Emergency Med-Kit when unlocking a Chest.

name: Vigil
description: Vigil extends its effect to all Survivors within 8 metres of your location and lingers for 15 seconds . "I am gonna be here when you wake up. You are gonna make it." — Quentin Smith • Increases the Recovery rate from the following Status Effects by 30% : The Blindness , Broken , Exhausted , Exposed , Haemorrhage , Hindered , Mangled , and Oblivious Status Effects . • The Blindness , Broken , Exhausted , Exposed , Haemorrhage , Hindered , Mangled , and Oblivious Status Effects . • 2 Calculations 2.1 Single Instance 2.2 Multi-Instance

name: Wake Up!
description: Once all Generators are completed, Wake Up! activates: "Ok, look. If we survive the next 24 hours, then I'll take you out on a real date." — Quentin Smith • The Auras of the Exit Gate Switches are revealed to you within 128 metres . • Your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors within 128 metres of your location while opening an Exit Gate . • Increases your Gate-Opening speed by 25% .

name: Background Player
description: Whenever another Survivor is picked up, Background Player activates for 10 seconds . Starting to run while it is active causes the following effect: Whenever another Survivor is picked up, Background Player activates for 10 seconds . Starting to run while it is active causes the following effect: • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 5 seconds .

name: Blood Rush
description: After unhooking yourself or being unhooked, Blood Rush activates for 60seconds : "Just gotta... push through!" — Renato Lyra • Press the Active Ability button to instantly recover from the Exhausted Status Effect .

name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth
description: Whenever another Survivor finishes healing you, Teamwork: Collective Stealth activates, and both you and the Survivor who healed you benefit from the following effect: "I'm good, I'm good... but keep it down." — Renato Lyra • Suppresses your Scratch Marks for as long as you stay within 16metres of one another. This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses. • This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses. • Suppresses your Scratch Marks for as long as you stay within 16metres of one another. This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses.

name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders
description: When in the Basement near the circle, press the Active Ability button to begin the Invocation , which takes 60 seconds to complete. During an Invocation , your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors and they can join in, accelerating the process by +100 % , if they too have an Invocation Perk equipped, or by +50 % , if they have not. Once the Invocation is completed, the following effects apply: • Permanently reduces the Repair Charges requirement of all Generators in the Trial by 10Charges . • You automatically enter the Injured State from any previous Health State, and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial.

name: Strength in Shadows
description: When you are in the Basement , Strength in Shadows activates: • Unlocks the Strength in Shadows ability, allowing you to self-heal without needing a Med-Kit at 70 % of the normal Healing speed. • Upon finishing a heal in the Basement, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 10seconds . • The Aura of the Killer is also revealed when healing other Survivors in the Basement . • Without any additional Healing-Speed modifiers in play, a full heal with Strength in Shadows takes 22.857 seconds to complete. Adding Botany Knowledge reduces this time to 15.238 seconds .

name: Wicked
description: • The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 20seconds after unhooking yourself or being unhooked. • Grants the ability to perform a successful Self-Unhook at any point during the first Hook Stage , if you are hooked in the Basement . This effect cannot be triggered during the second Hook Stage or if you are hooked as the Last Survivor Standing . • This effect cannot be triggered during the second Hook Stage or if you are hooked as the Last Survivor Standing . • It is not advised to use Wicked together with Deliverance , as the latter will take priority and thus inflict the Broken Status Effect . • Wicked's Killer Aura-reveal duration does not stack with Breakdown , the former's duration takes priority.

name: Babysitter
description: Whenever you unhook a Survivor, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds , while the unhooked Survivor benefits from the following effects for 30seconds instead: Whenever you unhook a Survivor, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds , while the unhooked Survivor benefits from the following effects for 30seconds instead: • Suppresses the creation of their Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood . • Increases the strength of their Haste Status Effect by +10 % .

name: Camaraderie
description: If you are hooked and enter the Struggle Phase , Camaraderie activates: If you are hooked and enter the Struggle Phase , Camaraderie activates: • Pauses the Struggle Phase timer for 34seconds as soon as any Survivor comes within 16 metres of your Hook .

name: Second Wind
description: When you heal another Survivor for the equivalent of 1 Health State , Second Wind activates: While Second Wind is active, the following conditions will deactivate it: • The next time you are unhooked or unhook yourself, you suffer from the Broken Status Effect until Second Wind deactivates. • You are automatically healed 1 Health State after 20seconds . • Successfully being healed by Second Wind .

name: Clean Break
description: After completing a Healing action on another Survivor, Clean Break activates. Press the Active Ability button while being healed by another Survivor to trigger the following effects: "I'll be fine! Don't stick your neck out for me." — Taurie Cain • Suffer from the Broken Status Effect . • You are automatically healed 1 Health State after 60seconds . This effect is cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State . • This effect is cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State .

name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows
description: When in the Basement near the circle, press the Active Ability button to begin the Invocation , which takes 60 seconds to complete. During an Invocation , your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors and they can join in, accelerating the process by +100 % , if they too have an Invocation Perk equipped, or by +50 % , if they have not. Once the Invocation is completed, the following effects apply: • Whenever the Killer scares a Crow while a Survivor is inside their Terror Radius , their Aura is revealed to all Survivors for 2seconds . • You automatically enter the Injured State from any previous Health State, and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial. • Whenever the Killer scares a Crow while a Survivor is inside their Terror Radius , their Aura is revealed to all Survivors for 2seconds .

name: Shoulder the Burden
description: Once per Trial, and while you are not on Death Hook , press the Active Ability button while standing in front of a Hooked Survivor to unhook them and trigger the following effects: "It's not your time yet. Now go on!" — Taurie Cain • Trade 1 Hook State with the other Survivor to their benefit. • Causes you to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 40seconds . • Trade 1 Hook State with the other Survivor to their benefit.

name: Cut Loose
description: After performing a Rush Vault action in a Chase, Cut Loose activates for the next 6seconds : Cut Loose has a cool-down of 45 seconds . • Suppresses both the Loud Noise Notification and the sound effects triggered by rushing to vault. • Successfully performing another Rush Vault action while Cut Loose is active resets the timer. • Cut Loose does not suppress the first Vault taken. It only suppresses subsequent Vaults.

name: Friendly Competition
description: Whenever you complete a Generator with at least one other Survivor, Friendly Competition activates: • Increases your Repair speed, and that of the other Survivor(s) who completed the repairs with you, by +5 % for the next 75seconds .

name: Teamwork: Power of Two
description: Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, Teamwork: Power of Two activates, and both you and the healed Survivor benefit from the following effect: Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, Teamwork: Power of Two activates, and both you and the healed Survivor benefit from the following effect: • Grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect for as long as you stay within 16metres of one another. This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses. • This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses. • Grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect for as long as you stay within 16metres of one another. This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses.

name: Exultation
description: Stunning the Killer with a Pallet upgrades the Rarity of your held Item to the next tier. "You will not take me this day!" — Trevor

name: Eyes of Belmont
description: Whenever a Generator is completed, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 3seconds . "Ha! Your secret has been revealed!" — Trevor • Extends the duration of all instances of the Killer's Aura being revealed to you by +2 seconds .

name: Moment of Glory
description: After performing the Unlocking or Rummaging action on Chests a total of 2 times , Moment of Glory activates: "Never lose hope for a brighter tomorrow." — Trevor • When you become injured, you instantly suffer from the Broken Status Effect . • You are automatically healed 1 Health State after 60seconds . This effect is cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State . • This effect is cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State .

name: Fogwise
description: • Succeeding a Great Skill Check while repairing a Generator reveals the Aura of the Killer to you for 6seconds .

name: Potential Energy
description: After uninterruptedly repairing Generators for a total of 8seconds , press the Active Ability button to activate Potential Energy : When Potential Energy has at least 1 Token , press the Active Ability button while repairing a Generator to instantly progress it by +1 % per accumulated Token, deactivating Potential Energy . • Continuing to repair the Generator will charge Potential Energy instead of progressing the Generator. • Converts 1.5 % of Repair progression into 1 Token , up to a maximum of 20 Tokens . • Missing Skill Checks results in losing some Tokens.

name: Quick Gambit
description: While being chased by the Killer, the following effects apply: "We need not resort to violence. And I shall prove it." — Vittorio Toscano • The Auras of other Survivors are revealed to you. • Increases the Repair speed of other Survivors by 5% .

name: Boon: Dark Theory
description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem . Soft chimes ring out in a radius of 24 metres . All Survivors benefit from the following effects when inside the Boon Totem's radius: • Grants a +2 % Haste Status Effect . This effect lingers for 4seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range. • This effect lingers for 4seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range.

name: Empathic Connection
description: • Whenever another Survivor is injured, they can see your Aura within 96metres of your location. • Increases your Altruistic Healing speed by +30 % .

name: Parental Guidance
description: • After stunning the Killer by any means, Parental Guidance suppresses your Scratch Marks , Pools of Blood , and Grunts of Pain for the next 7seconds . • Parental Guidance's activation conditions include anything that stuns the Killer, including flashlight rescues.

name: Any Means Necessary
description: Press and hold the Active Ability button for 4seconds while standing beside a dropped Pallet to reset it to its upright position. Press and hold the Active Ability button for 4seconds while standing beside a dropped Pallet to reset it to its upright position. • Grants the ability to see the Auras of all dropped but not yet destroyed Pallets in the environment.

name: Breakout
description: The following effects apply while you are within 5 metres of the Killer carrying another Survivor: "Come, we are going to rip our way out of this." — Yui Kimura • Grants you a 7% Haste Status Effect . • Increases the carried Survivor's Wiggling speed by +25 % .

name: Lucky Break
description: Whenever you are in the Injured State , Lucky Break activates: Each 1 second spent healing another Survivor recharges Lucky Break by 1 second up to its maximum Effect duration. • Suppresses your Pools of Blood and Scratch Marks for a maximum of 60seconds , after which Lucky Break deactivates.

name: Fast Track
description: Whenever a Survivor other than yourself is hooked, Fast Track is granted 3Token(s) , up to a maximum of 27Tokens . Whenever you consume Fast Track' s Tokens, this sound cue will play for the Perk user: • Succeeding a Great Repair Skill Check consumes all accumulated Tokens. • Increases the bonus Progression awarded for succeeding that Skill Check by a stack-able +1 % per Token. • The progression added to a Generator by Fast Track will count towards charging any Perk that requires repairing a Generator for a certain amount of Progression to activate it (i.e. Flashbang ).

name: Self-Preservation
description: The more confirmation you get of that, the more prepared you become. Whenever another Survivor is hit with a Basic Attack or Special Attack within 16 metres of you, Self-Preservation activates: "Something I learnt in the industry: when the axe is swinging, keep your head down." — Yun-Jin Lee • Scratch Marks , Grunts of Pain when injured, and Bleeding are suppressed for the next 10seconds . • Self-Preservation also activates whenever a Survivor gets hit (but not damaged) by The Trickster 's Blades .

name: Smash Hit
description: Stunning the Killer with a Pallet triggers Smash Hit : "I have dealt with psychopaths in suits. You're just uglier and worse dressed." — Yun-Jin Lee • Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 4 seconds .

name: For the People
description: While healthy and healing another Survivor without using a Med-Kit , press the Active Ability button to trigger the following effects: "We can write our own story and decide how it really ends." — Zarina Kassir • Trade 1 Health State with the other Survivor: Instantly heals them to the Injured State , if they were dying or suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect . Instantly heals them to full health, if they were injured. • Instantly heals them to the Injured State , if they were dying or suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect . • Instantly heals them to full health, if they were injured.

name: Off the Record
description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Off the Record activates for the next 80seconds : Off the Record deactivates once the Exit Gates are powered. • Prevents your Aura from being revealed to the Killer , if they attempt to read it. • Suppresses Grunts of Pain when injured. • Grants the Endurance Status Effect . Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action .

name: Red Herring
description: After repairing a Generator for at least 3 seconds , its Aura is highlighted to you in yellow . Red Herring has a cool-down of 40seconds . "The news edit out what is burdensome and complex. which is the truth." — Zarina Kassir • The Generator stays highlighted until it is either fully repaired, you start repairing another Generator, or enter a Locker . • Entering a Locker will trigger a Loud Noise Notification for the Killer at the highlighted Generator's location. • If Red Herring's cool-down timer elapses while repairing a Generator, the Perk will not automatically reactivate after 3 seconds . One must briefly interrupt and restart the Repair action for that.

name: Appraisal
description: Appraisal has 3 Tokens at the start of the Trial: Chests require 10 Charges to complete the Rummaging interaction. Appraisal functions by increasing the default Action speed of 1 c/s to 1.4 c/s / 1.6 c/s / 1.8 c/s : • Consume -1 Token to perform the Rummage action on an already unlocked Chest in order to retrieve a second Item from it. • Increases Rummaging speed by 80% . • If using Plunderer's Instinct and/or Ace in the Hole with Appraisal , Items found by rummaging through Chests also benefit from their effects.

name: Deception
description: Interacting with a Locker while holding the Sprint button has the following effects: Interacting with a Locker while holding the Sprint Button has the following effects: • Prevents you from entering the Locker , allowing you to run past it. • Causes the doors of the Locker to swiftly open and close, feining a Survivor entering it. • Triggers a Loud Noise Notification at the location of the Locker .

name: Power Struggle
description: While being carried by The Killer, reaching 15% Wiggling progression activates Power Struggle : Power Struggle deactivates after triggering successfully. • Reveals the Auras of available Pallets whenever you are in the Dying State . • You can drop a nearby, standing Pallet to stun the Killer and escape their grasp.
